/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/DAWT/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAW/DEFTARR/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDTR:07-18-22/CONTD: PRETRIAL CONFERENCE 06-09-22 AND TRIAL 07-01-22/DOP/

/CAL:PRELIMINARY HEARING, FORTHWITH FROM DEPT, 12/INTC/WIT SWORN:SFPD OFFICER MYLES MCMASTER/EXHMA:PEOPLE'S 1 - PHOTO/HTA1:1/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S ORAL MOTION TO RELEASE DEFENDANT FROM CUSTODY IS DENIED,/X:THE COURT GRANTS A BAIL REDUCTION,/BAIL:8,000/DEFTCUST3/SHERCOM1/CTORD:AS A CONDITION OF POSTING BAIL DEFENDANT MUST ENROLL IN S,F, SHERIFF'S GPS ELECTRONIC MONITORING PROGRAM/CONTD:ARRAIGNMENT IN DEPT 22 ON 05-18-22/DOP/X:EXHIBITSMARKED AND ADMITTED INTO EVIDENCE ARE ORDERED RETURNED TO THE OFFERING PARTY PENDING FURTHER ORDER OF COURT,/
/CAL: PRELIMINARY HEARING/NP/TRANS 20: FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING AT 1:45 PM//X: THE 04-30-22 SHERIFF'S AFFIDAVIT WARRANT WAS DISCHARGED ON 05-02-22,/TE: 1 HOUR/LDPX: 05-24-22 (60)/

/CAL: ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX: 04-11-22 (10), 5-24-22 (60)/SAORD/SA4: STAY OUT OF THE AREA BORDERED BY OFARRELL (NORTH), LARKIN (WEST), MARKET (SOUTH) AND MASON (EAST), SAN FRANCISCO, CA,/OR/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIALMONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE,AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILLPROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/WS/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/CONTD: PRELIMINARY HEARING/DOP/TE: 1 HOUR/
/CAL: ARGUMENT ON RELEASE/INTC/X: THE COURT CONFIRMS THE FUTURE DATE/CONTD: JURY TRIAL/DOP/
